title: Agentic AI Architecture Proof
summary: Focused proof of Joz's agentic AI architecture, retrieval, orchestration, and production-minded systems capability.
body:
Agentic AI Architecture Proof

Purpose
This record isolates Joz's strongest agentic AI architecture and orchestration capabilities so the Skills lane can answer with focused, high-signal technical credibility instead of falling back to a broad CV summary.

Core positioning
- Joz is strongest in agentic AI architecture, retrieval-backed intelligence systems, orchestration, and production-minded applied AI delivery.
- The profile combines system design, context engineering, retrieval, memory patterns, observability, and business-facing execution.

Capabilities
- Agentic intelligence systems, autonomous reasoning, and orchestration
- LLMs, RAG, embeddings, vector search, knowledge graphs, and context engineering
- Memory architectures, retrieval systems, ACL-aware access, verification, and feedback loops
- Event-driven production AI and asynchronous workflows
- Data platforms, secure API ecosystems, and cloud-native delivery
- Observability, governance, and production decision loops

Proof and context
- MarketClue USA: architected financial AI agents with live data and asset portfolios.
- Apple/Pixar-adjacent work: early Python USD(z) and computer-vision AI work in Singapore.
- Dubai Future Foundation: rapid AI prototyping for public-sector innovation initiatives.
- Erste Bank: engineering and EU accessibility work in a large banking environment serving 16M+ customers.
- 20+ Dubai and Singapore FinTechs: led HCD-AI, product, and data architectures across multiple operating contexts.

Answering rule
- When the question is about AI systems depth, architecture, retrieval, orchestration, or production readiness, this record should outrank generic CV phrasing.
- Lead with architectural strength and enterprise context before smaller novelty signals.

verification.notes: Derived from the verified current CV and aligned to the existing recruiter-screening and enterprise-scale records.

claims: Joz is strongest in agentic AI architecture, retrieval-backed intelligence systems, orchestration, and production-minded applied AI delivery.
Joz's AI systems capability includes LLMs, RAG, embeddings, vector search, knowledge graphs, and context engineering.
Joz's delivery profile combines system design, memory patterns, observability, and business-facing execution.
proof_points: MarketClue USA work is described as financial AI agents with live data and asset portfolios.
Apple/Pixar-adjacent work is framed as early Python USD(z) and computer-vision AI work in Singapore.
Dubai Future Foundation and Erste Bank add public-sector and enterprise-scale delivery context.
The CV explicitly lists retrieval systems, verification loops, event-driven workflows, and governance.
